basic_details.job_title: NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Meghalaya (NIT Meghalaya) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position. Candidates holding M.Tech/ M.E. in Electrical Engineering with specialization in Power & Energy Systems, Power Electronics & Drives, Renewable Energy, Smart Grid (or equivalent), or GATE-qualified B.Tech./ B.E. in Electrical Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Electronics & Electrical Engineering, or other related disciplines are eligible to apply via email. The application process

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/ M.E in Electrical Engineering with specialization in Power & Energy Systems, Power Electronics & Drives, Renewable Energy, Smart Grid (or equivalent), GATE-qualified B.Tech./ B.E. in Electrical Engineering or Electrical & Electronics Engineering or Electronics & Electrical Engineering or other related disciplines
qualification.details: M.Tech/M.E in Electrical Engineering with specialization in Power & Energy Systems, Power Electronics & Drives, Renewable Energy, Smart Grid (or equivalent). GATE-qualified candidates with a B.Tech./B.E. in Electrical Engineering or Electrical & Electronics Engineering or Electronics & Electrical Engineering or other related disciplines.

salary_details.details: INR 37,000/- p.m. for first two years and INR 42,000/- p.m. for the third year

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Meghalaya Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Meghalaya JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Tech/M.E in Electrical Engineering with specific specializations or a GATE-qualified B.Tech./B.E. in related Electrical disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post at NIT Meghalaya.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is through email. You need to send your application and documents to the official email address provided.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the NIT Meghalaya JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Meghalaya located?
faq.answer: NIT Meghalaya is located in Sohra, Meghalaya, with the pincode 793108.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is NITMGH/ES/ANRF/EE/06/2026-27/486.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the National Institute of Technology Meghalaya.
